page_metadata.biotools__summary: Software for the prediction of orthologs between two species, based on transcripts sequence similarities. A procedure to extend BLAST alignments and to define orthologs based on the “Bidirectional Best Hit” approach was implemented.
page_metadata.bioschemas__summary: Software for the prediction of orthologs between two species, based on transcripts sequence similarities. A procedure to extend BLAST alignments and to define orthologs based on the “Bidirectional Best Hit” approach was implemented.
